

## Marketing Automation MVP — `/marketing`

### Overview

A new superAdmin-only page at `/marketing` with sidebar navigation containing four sections: Overview, Content Ideas, Draft Posts, and Settings. Uses AI (Lovable AI Gateway) to generate content ideas and draft posts. Drafts are persisted to Supabase. No other pages are modified except `App.tsx` (add route) and `Header.tsx` (add nav link for superAdmins).

### Database Tables (2 new tables)

```sql
-- Content ideas generated by AI or manually added
CREATE TABLE marketing_content_ideas (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  company_id UUID REFERENCES companies(id) ON DELETE CASCADE NOT NULL,
  created_by UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  category TEXT, -- e.g. 'blog', 'social', 'newsletter'
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'new', -- 'new', 'approved', 'drafted', 'dismissed'
  ai_generated BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

-- Draft posts (linked to idea or standalone)
CREATE TABLE marketing_drafts (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  company_id UUID REFERENCES companies(id) ON DELETE CASCADE NOT NULL,
  created_by UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  idea_id UUID REFERENCES marketing_content_ideas(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  content TEXT DEFAULT '',
  platform TEXT, -- 'linkedin', 'facebook', 'instagram', 'blog', 'email'
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'draft', -- 'draft', 'review', 'approved', 'scheduled', 'published'
  scheduled_at TIMESTAMPTZ, -- for future scheduling support
  published_at TIMESTAMPTZ, -- for future publishing tracking
  ai_generated BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}', -- extensible for future platform-specific data
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);
```

RLS: Both tables use `company_id = get_user_company_id(auth.uid())` for SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE, following existing patterns. SuperAdmin access is enforced at the UI level (consistent with admin page pattern).

### Edge Function

**`supabase/functions/marketing-ai/index.ts`** — Single function with two modes:
- `type: "ideas"` — generates 5 content ideas based on a prompt/topic
- `type: "draft"` — generates a full draft post from an idea title + platform

Uses `LOVABLE_API_KEY` + Lovable AI Gateway (already configured). Returns structured output via tool calling.

### New Files

```text
src/pages/Marketing.tsx              — Main page with sidebar + content area
src/components/marketing/
  MarketingSidebar.tsx               — Sidebar with 4 nav items
  MarketingOverview.tsx              — Stats cards + recent activity
  MarketingIdeas.tsx                 — Ideas list + AI generate button
  MarketingDrafts.tsx                — Drafts list + editor
  MarketingSettings.tsx              — Platform config (placeholder for MVP)
  DraftEditorDialog.tsx              — Dialog to edit/create a draft
supabase/functions/marketing-ai/
  index.ts                           — AI generation edge function
```

### Modified Files

- **`src/App.tsx`** — Add `/marketing` route (standalone like `/admin`, not inside AuthenticatedLayout)
- **`src/components/Header.tsx`** — Add "Marketing" nav link visible only to superAdmins with `
